headline: SDG&E Drives High Solar Adoption as One in Four Customers Go Solar
summary: San Diego Gas & Electric (SDG&E) is helping enable the grid of the future, with more than 350,000 residential customers now generating their own power through rooftop solar – equivalent to more than one in four customers and one of the highest adoption rates in the nation.
